text: Machine learning is a type of artificial intelligence where computers learn from data. One common method is supervised learning. In this process, the computer is given a set of training data, which includes examples with known answers. For example, you might show the computer many pictures of cats and dogs, each labeled correctly. Using this data, the computer builds a model—a set of rules or patterns it has learned. Once the model is ready, it can make predictions on new, unseen data. The accuracy of these predictions is then measured to see how well the model performs. The goal is to improve accuracy over time.
